mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.mgmtOffice.complaint.mapper.ManagerComplaintMapper.selectComplaintCount*/ FROM cvpl c LEFT JOIN member m ON c.user_no = m.user_no LEFT JOIN apt_detail ad ON c.ho_no = ad.ho_no LEFT JOIN apt_unit au ON ad.dong_no = au.dong_no

SELECT * /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.mgmtOffice.complaint.mapper.ManagerComplaintMapper.selectComplaintList*/ FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, t.* FROM ( SELECT c.cvpl_no ,c.cvpl_ty_cd ,c.cvpl_ttl ,c.cvpl_cn ,c.cvpl_stts_cd ,c.cvpl_prrt ,TO_CHAR(c.cvpl_reg_dt, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS cvpl_reg_dt ,TO_CHAR(c.cvpl_rcpt_dt, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS cvpl_rcpt_dt ,TO_CHAR(c.cvpl_end_dt, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS cvpl_end_dt ,m.user_nm ,au.dong_nm ,ad.ho ,h.pic_id ,h.cvpl_ans ,h.cvpl_stts_cd AS hstry_stts_cd ,c.cvpl_file_no FROM cvpl c LEFT JOIN member m ON c.user_no = m.user_no LEFT JOIN apt_detail ad ON c.ho_no = ad.ho_no LEFT JOIN apt_unit au ON ad.dong_no = au.dong_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cvpl_no ,pic_id ,cvpl_ans ,cvpl_stts_cd ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cvpl_no ORDER BY cvpl_reg_dt DESC) AS rk FROM cvpl_hstry ) h ON c.cvpl_no = h.cvpl_no AND h.rk = 1
ORDER BY c.cvpl_reg_dt DESC ) t WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}

SELECT mg.user_no /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.mgmtOffice.complaint.mapper.ManagerComplaintMapper.selectMngrList*/ ,m.user_nm ,mg.mngr_duty_cd FROM manager mg INNER JOIN member m ON mg.user_no = m.user_no WHERE mg.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo}
SELECT file_og_name ,file_path ,file_ext ,file_size ,file_save_uuid ,mime_type ,google_id FROM attach_file WHERE file_group_no = TO_NUMBER(#{cvplFileNo}) ORDER BY file_sort_order
